rationale: The round-1 occurrence statistic is corrected: I reproduced 99 exact slash-form .mindspec/docs/{specs,adr,domains,core} occurrences across 21 non-test Go files, and 110 across 22 files including filepath.Join forms. The new line-anchored citations I checked match the tree: ownership.go domainManifestRelPath/LoadOwnershipAtRef and TreeDirsAtRef, budgeter.go spec/domain joins, migrate.go rubric routes, redact.go's only docs references, the spec template glossary line, ms-spec-grill's domains/ADR reads, and sampled workspace/docsync/panel/doctor/bootstrap anchors. I found no material factual citation error introduced by the revision.

findings.issue: Round-1 finding addressed. The revised '~99 exact slash-form across 21 non-test files (~110 incl. filepath.Join)' statistic reproduces against the worktree using occurrence counts, not just matching lines.

Checked the requested ownership.go, budgeter.go, migrate.go, redact.go, internal/instruct/templates/spec.md, and ms-spec-grill SKILL.md anchors, plus sampled req/AC citations in workspace.go, docsync.go, panel.go, gate.go, doctor/migration.go, ownership.go, and bootstrap.go. They exist and support the claims made.
